name: BROOKMOUNT EXPLORATIONS INC
business: Brookmount Explorations Inc. is a mineral exploration company with a 100% interest in the Mercedes 100 property in Peru, consisting of seven mineral claims targeting base and precious metals (silver and gold). The company is in the pre-exploration stage and has not generated any revenues from operations.

exposures.sentence: we are the beneficial owner of a 100% interest in the Mercedes 100 property, which consists of seven mineral claims (the Property ).
